page: Amazon Web Services c8ib.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, compute-optimized server instance featuring dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. It is configured with 192 physical cores and 384 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system provides 768.0 GB of system memory, establishing a compute-focused ratio of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This bare-metal instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached resources. To support high-throughput data transfers and network-bound workloads, the server features a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps.

Given its massive core count, high clock speed, and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for highly parallelized, compute-intensive workloads. It is well-suited for applications such as high-performance computing, large-scale batch processing, and intensive scientific simulations that require direct hardware access without virtualization overhead.
